# Hyphen Usage (Quickstart) Guide
## 1 - Installing
Install Hyphen with using the right installer in [Releases](https://github.com/EmxrWasHere0/Hyphen/releases).

## 2 - Setting Up  
Enter the credentials that HyInstaller requests from you. HyInstaller will set everything up for you.

## 3 - Usage  
- In Windows:  
    - You need to run Hyphen App to use Hyphen.

- In Linux:  
    - You can enable standalone and WebUI services (only for `systemd`) and use them whenever you want.

- In macOS:  
    - You need to run Hyphen App to use Hyphen.

Hyphen is designed only for local networks. Please avoid exposing it's endpoints to public.
Hyphen uses :8000/tcp and :8001/tcp. If any other app using these ports, please change it from app's own settings. Hyphen will also have port settings soon. Meanwhile we can only ask for this.
